# BLUE N WATER

BLUE N WATER (BNW) is a water treatment and resource-circulation platform company based on RaDX catalyst technology and AQUACOM.

Core topics: RaDX catalyst, AQUACOM, BLUE BOX mobile water purification, K-GIM food-processing water, industrial wastewater, water reuse, resource recovery, Urban Mining, Blue Eye AI operation roadmap.

Official site: https://bluenwater.com/
Official blog: https://blog.naver.com/bluen_water/
Contact: bluenwaterceo@gmail.com
